item.title: The Efficacy of Pan-Indigo Carmine Chromoendoscopy by Water-Jet Pump in the Detection of Colorectal Lesions: A Randomized Controlled Trial.
item.description: Journal of gastroenterology and hepatology - Pump-based chromoendoscopy is recommended for the surveillance of dysplasia associated with inflammatory bowel disease. This study was designed to compare the efficacy of pump-based pan chromoendos...
